{{Quote|If the Rebels won't surrender, we'll bury them in their bunkers.|Maximilian Veers|<ref name="TNEGtWaT" />}}
The '''Battle of Ghorman''', also known as the '''Pacification of Ghorman''', was a battle that took place on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Ghorman/Legends|Ghorman]] during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]].

==The battle==
{{Quote|You've fought against it, you know its weaknesses, and more importantly, you know what a killer it can be. Men, meet the newest addition to the Stormtrooper Corps.|[[TK-342]], on the [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droid]], prior to the battle|<ref name="TNEGtD" />}}
[[General/Legends|General]] [[Maximilian Veers/Legends|Maximilian Veers]] led the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] forces during the battle. When the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebels]] retreated to their bunkers, General Veers ordered his troops to use [[PLX-2M portable missile launcher]]s against them.<ref name="TNEGtWaT" />

During the battle, [[Stormtrooper Commander/Legends|Stormtrooper commander]] [[TK-342]] and his men fought alongside [[DSD1 dwarf spider droid/Legends|DSD1 dwarf spider droids]] for the first time.<ref name="TNEGtD" />
